description: Topographic 3D terrain model of the Wakatipu and Cardrona Valley region (South Island, NZ; ~35 km x 35 km). Includes Fernhill, Coronet Peak, Coronet Peak Flight Park, The Remarkables, and the former Snow Park NZ site (Pisa Range). 100 mm model, 2.0x vertical exaggeration, 3 mm flat base. Also ships as three material-separated parts (lake / terrain / snow) that share the same footprint and stack back into the full model: Lake Wakatipu prints as a separate insert filling its footprint up to the water surface, with an estimated sloped lakebed so the banks incline believably, and snow caps above a global snow line. Elevation data: AWS Open Data Terrain Tiles (Mapzen terrarium, zoom 14). An assembly.scad preview stacks all three parts into the full model (blue lake, grey terrain, white snow caps).
